positive: A central, stylized geometric woodland scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. Show elegant silhouettes of deer and fox amidst stylized, oversized ferns and mushroom clusters. The overall aesthetic should evoke a whimsical, magical 'cottagecore' feel, but executed with sharp, high-contrast graphic design elements. Use a limited, striking color palette: deep indigo blues, ethereal jade greens, pops of luminous cyan, and stark cream accents. The composition must be balanced and symmetrical, designed to look excellent when repeated or centered on fabric. Crisp line work, vector art quality, maximal detail, studio lighting, clean edges, forest magic illustration style, graphic design illustration.
